each line item that contains the relevant service. Dialysis claims are a subset of the claims, and a subset 
of procedures in the Part B carrier data file. 

Dialysis claim lines are defined as those with a line BETOS code (BETOS_CD) where the first two digits = 
“P9.” 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: DIALYS_EVENTS 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 6 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: Null/missing or 1–XXX 

COMMENT: There are 11 cost/use categories from the carrier Part B and durable medical equipment (DME)
